subject: [PATCH v2 01/28] filelock: pass current blocking lease to trace_break_lease_block() rather than "new_fl"

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch updates the filelock code to pass the current blocking lease to the trace_break_lease_block() function instead of a new lease, allowing for more accurate tracing information. The change also ensures that the trace_break_lease_unblock() function is passed a NULL pointer when the original lease may have been freed, preventing potential deception in the tracing output.
